accepted_facts_from_reference: ports extclk, wdt_pause, wdt_rst, wdt_int, pclk, presetn, psel, penable, paddr[4:2], pwrite, pwdata[31:0], prdata[31:0]
register offsets VER 0x00, CR 0x10, RES 0x14, WEN 0x18, SR 0x1c
pclk target period 20 ns from imported SDC

approved_decisions.answer: Clean-room compatible; reference RTL is behavioral evidence only and generated RTL is SSOT-owned clean-room output.
Keep the reference APB-like psel/penable/pwrite/paddr/pwdata/prdata interface for the first compatibility pass; no pready/pslverr.
Keep 16-bit and 32-bit modes parameterized, defaulting to the reference 16-bit configuration.
Treat extclk and wdt_pause as asynchronous inputs synchronized into pclk by generated local logic.
WEN magic 0x5aa5 unlocks exactly one following protected write and then auto-clears.
Lock the observed CR.INTTIME and CR.RSTTIME counter-bit tap tables for compatibility.
Match reference visibility: SR bit0 reports interrupt timeout; reset timeout is visible through wdt_rst only.
Generated RTL implements manifest-owned local synchronizers instead of depending on external nds_sync_l2l.
Use standard local evidence for this first FL -> RTL -> TB -> sim -> lint iteration; production gates can follow after behavior stabilizes.
